title: Excise - section 60 demand - supporting information
description: Information to provide with your objection about an excise section 60 demand.

content_blocks.text: To lodge an objection about an excise section 60 demand:

items: complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
provide the supporting information listed below.

content_blocks.text: Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for an objection about excise section 60 demand includes:

items: evidence that the duty has been paid
evidence that the goods were not excisable or were not in your possession, custody or control.

content_text:
## How to lodge
To lodge an objection about an excise section 60 demand:
- complete and submit the relevant form Objection form – for taxpayers Objection form – for tax professionals
- provide the supporting information listed below.
## Supporting information
Providing this information up front will reduce delays.
If you've previously given us any of the information listed below, you don't need to resend it.
The information we need for an objection about excise section 60 demand includes:
- evidence that the duty has been paid
- evidence that the goods were not excisable or were not in your possession, custody or control.
